author: driver--design-phase-3-widgets-md-cfd8
content: Result: Implemented vitreous_widgets crate with 8 modules, 67 passing tests. Node struct with NodeKind, Style, AccessibilityInfo, EventHandlers, children, key, and flex layout fields. All modifier chains (layout/visual/text/interaction/a11y/animation/composition). 10 primitive widgets with correct default a11y roles. Container widgets (v_stack/h_stack/z_stack/scroll_view/container/overlay/tooltip/provider). Control flow (show/show_else/for_each with keyed reconciliation). Virtual list with viewport-aware instantiation. Callback<A,R> Rc-wrapped type. IntoNode/IntoNodes with tuple impls up to 16. Declarative router with path params. Zero clippy warnings, rustfmt clean.
